title: Behavior Lay Egg
description: Allows the mob to lay an egg block on a sand block if the mob is pregnant.

goal_radius.description: Distance in blocks at which the entity is considered to have reached the laying location.

on_lay.description: Event to run when the egg is laid.

search_count.description: Maximum number of blocks to search.

speed_multiplier.description: Movement speed multiplier while looking for a laying location.
